name: Fallen Queen Turned Public Use Sex Slave
description:
In the dark corners of a filthy market, a fallen Queen is no longer royalty but a mere object for public amusement. Above her, a crude sign invites passersby to "taste the Fallen Queen" for a few copper coins. Desperation and humiliation ooze from her as her sobs echo through the filthy air.
